     The Numbers Business Report

Jigsaw (2017)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $38,052,832Details
International Box Office $66,170,483
Worldwide Box Office $104,223,315
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $3,906,568
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $3,877,476
Total $7,784,044
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Much has been said about John Kramer. The flesh is finite. His work, his legacy, is the gospel that wakes us from our stupor and gives our lives purpose as the clock continues to count down. I have followed his teachings and learned from his philosophy, and I have dedicated my life to dissecting, testing, and understanding that “vital piece”. Jigsaw becomes legion: a horde of disciples who understand a life is measured not in increments but by a single defining moment. How many of us truly know what we are capable of until we are given the ultimate choice: Live or Die? How many of us crave the clarity only the games can provide? How much of your own blood are you willing to spill, how many pounds of flesh are you willing to shed, to be free? This world is suffering. You are suffering. But you are not alone. Not anymore. Let the games begin.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$16,640,452 (43.7% of total gross)
Legs:2.29 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:36.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$10,000,000 (worldwide box office is 10.4 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,941 opening theaters/2,941 max. theaters, 3.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $50,737,107

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 27th, 2017 (Wide) by Lionsgate
October 27th, 2017 (IMAX) by Lionsgate
International Releases: October 27th, 2017 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
October 27th, 2017 (Wide) (Russia (CIS))
October 27th, 2017 (Wide) (Germany)
October 27th, 2017 (Wide) (Netherlands)
October 27th, 2017 (Wide) (Czech Republic)
Video Release: January 9th, 2018 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for sequences of grisly bloody violence and torture, and for language.
(Rating bulletin 2466 (Cert #50946), 3/8/2017)
Running Time: 91 minutes
Franchise: Saw
Cast, crew, or production detail: Family Affair, Legacy Sequel
Film format: IMAX: DMR
Plot point: Escape, Kidnap, Murder Mystery, Posthumous Adventure, Serial Killer, Torture Porn
Subgenre: Slasher Horror
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Twisted Pictures, Serendipity Prods, A Bigger Boat Productions
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Much has been said about John Kramer. The flesh is finite. His work, his legacy, is the gospel that wakes us from our stupor and gives our lives purpose as the clock continues to count down. I have followed his teachings and learned from his philosophy, and I have dedicated my life to dissecting, testing, and understanding that “vital piece”. Jigsaw becomes legion: a horde of disciples who understand a life is measured not in increments but by a single defining moment. How many of us truly know what we are capable of until we are given the ultimate choice: Live or Die? How many of us crave the clarity only the games can provide? How much of your own blood are you willing to spill, how many pounds of flesh are you willing to shed, to be free? This world is suffering. You are suffering. But you are not alone. Not anymore. Let the games begin.
